@startuml skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center participant "客户端" as Client { } box AMS #LightBlue2 participant "" as A1 end box box UserControl #WhiteSmoke participant "" as UC1 end box Client ->>A1 : registerUserSwitchObserver\n(IUserSwitchObserver) note right of Client:注册回调接口 A1->>UC1 :registerUserSwitchObserver \n(IUserSwitchObserver ) Client -[dashed]>A1 : switchUser() activate A1 A1-[dotted]->UC1:startUser()\ndispatchUserSwitch\ndebug("onStart") note left of UC1:执行切换用户动作，发送REPORT_USER_SWITCH_MSG\ncall dispatchUserSwitch(0)\nsynchronized(mLock){...}\nmHandler.sendMessage(msg) deactivate A1 return IRemoteCallback.sendResult():通知客户端处理完用户切换后回调传递的callback来通知AMS group wait for all clients to finish processing before continuing user switching work note over UCSwitcherServiceStub#dispatchUserSwitchComplete:\c[client callback] onUserSwitching(newUserId,callback);


wait until client finishes handling

loop For each registered observer in mObservers list do alt if (!observer.onUserSwitching(...)) then return false; // abort current operation immediately without further steps below this point! i.e., don't call continue or complete methods at bottom part here either way since we already failed early enough anyway so just exit out now instead wasting more time trying other stuff later down road which won’t help anything anymore given failure occurred earlier up front during initial checks performed first thing inside try block above where actual logic begins executing normally otherwise would have continued onward past these lines too had everything gone smoothly till very last step reached successfully overall thus far today indeed sir/madam thank you kindly again please feel free
